content.en:
"What the hell is the secret, if it is of little value, our Liuli Sect will not offend a Quadruple Heaven Force!"

Xuangang True Ancestor said with a smile.

In his eyes, the Void Heaven One Vein is the Quadruple Heaven Force, and it can be regarded as one of the Middle Triple Heaven Forces, although this Quadruple Heaven Force is relatively weak, and there is only one Quadruple Heaven Dao Ancestor.

But now, the Dao Ancestor of their Liuli Sect has not been born, just relying on them, these true ancestors, if they want to destroy the Void Heaven One Pulse, they will undoubtedly not be able to do it, at most they will destroy the Void Heaven True Country.

But if they really want to do this, with the power of a large number of True Ancestors in the Void Heaven True Country, it is enough to inflict some damage on their Liuli Sect.

Therefore, if there is no huge benefit, the Liuli Sect will naturally not offend the Void Heaven Bloodline.

"A realm beast, is this secret enough?"

Huoyun True Ancestor said.

"What, Beast, you're not kidding?"

Xuangang True Ancestor couldn't help but exclaim.

The realm beast is not an ordinary creature, but a Dao Ancestor as soon as it makes a move, and can eventually grow into a creature at the level of the strongest Dao Ancestor.

Moreover, the beast contains a strange world, and the strange world has a special energy, and all the creatures born in the strange world are better, and it is easy to give birth to real geniuses.

This shows how valuable a realm beast is.

It can be said that once a realm beast is born, the Upper Triple Heaven forces will snatch it up, and even fight at all costs.

"I don't believe that you have a Bounded Beast in the Dark God Temple, if you really have a Bounded Beast, even if your realm is relatively weak, it is enough to become a fourth-or fifth-tier heavenly force, how can it be only a third-tier heavenly force?" Xuangang True Ancestor said coldly.

"Xuangang True Ancestor, I'm talking about a dead realm beast!"

Huoyun True Ancestor hurriedly explained.

"Dead Realm Beast, who will kill a Realm Beast, crazy or not?"

Xuangang True Ancestor was incredulous.

In the Divine Heaven Realm, the realm beast is a treasure, a peerless and rare creature, and it is too late to protect it, how can it be killed?

Moreover, there is too much difference between a living Realm Beast and a dead Realm Beast.

If a realm beast dies, its internal world will slowly collapse, unless the world is conceived at a huge cost, the strange world can be saved, and its effect is far inferior to the strange world inside the living realm beast.

Killing a Boundary Beast is equivalent to erasing 99% of its value!

Therefore, no force or individual will kill the beast.

"It's our Dark God Temple that didn't know the Boundary Beast at the beginning, that Boundary Beast was killed by our hall master not long after it was born, and then we learned the origin of the Boundary Beast, but it was too late to regret it, but we still kept the strange world in the body of the Boundary Beast, which is our current Dark God Realm. And the corpse of the beast was kept by us in a forbidden place, and no one has found it so far!"

Huoyun True Ancestor explained.

"There is evidence, if there is no evidence, I still won't believe it!"

Xuangang True Ancestor Dao.

"Yes!" Fire Cloud True Ancestor took out a large scale.

Seeing this scale, Xuangang True Ancestor immediately believed Huoyun True Ancestor's statement, because this was a boundary beast scale, and only this kind of scale was found on the boundary beast, and it was impossible to forge it at all.

"Huoyun True Ancestor, if you Dark God Temple really want to take refuge in our Liuli Sect, then let your Hall Master personally come to the incarnation and talk to me, after all, you can't represent the Dark God Temple!" Xuangang True Ancestor said.

"This ......"

Huoyun True Ancestor was a little embarrassed.

After all, their hall master is a Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and Xuangang True Ancestor is just a True Ancestor, let the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor negotiate with the True Ancestor, what is the matter?

"Xuangang True Ancestor, I need to ask for instructions!"

Huoyun True Ancestor Dao.

"Yes!" Xuangang True Ancestor nodded.

Immediately, the Fire Cloud True Ancestor contacted the Dark God Hall Master.

Soon after, the Dark God Hall Master sent a message that he was willing to come to the Liuli Sect in person.

Ten days later.

The Lord of the Dark Temple descended to the incarnation and talked to the Xuangang True Ancestor.

The negotiations lasted half a month, and finally the two sides reached a condition.

That is, the Dark Temple is under the jurisdiction of the Liuli Sect on the surface, but the Liuli Sect is not allowed to interfere in the internal affairs of the Dark Temple, and needs to provide some inheritance of the Dark Temple, as well as help the Dark God Temple deal with the Void Sky lineage.

What the Dark God Temple needs to provide is Surrender, as well as the transportation of ninety percent of geniuses to the Liuli Sect, and let some of the true ancestors of the Liuli Sect be stationed in the Dark God Realm.

In addition, a kind of boundary stone will be born in the inner world of the boundary beast, and all these boundary stones will be given to the Liuli Sect.

At this point, the two parties draw up a contract of rules.

After the Dark God Temple took refuge, the Lord of the Dark God Temple left, and the Fire Cloud True Ancestor stayed in the Liuli Sect.

Liuli Sect, a hall inside.

Xuangang True Ancestor reported the information to one of the strongest True Ancestors of the Liuli Sect, the Xuanling True Ancestor.

"Senior Brother Xuanling, that's the way it is, that dead realm beast is almost in our hands!" Xuan Gang True Ancestor said excitedly.

"Did they really promise to give us all the boundary stones?" said the Xuan Ling True Ancestor in shock.

It's not an ordinary thing, the people of the Dark Temple actually gave them all the Glass Sect.

"The people of the Dark God Temple shouldn't know the value of the boundary stone, in fact, even in the Divine Heaven Realm, those lower Triple Heaven forces and many middle Triple Heaven forces don't know what the boundary stone is, if it weren't for a message about the boundary beast within our Liuli Sect, we wouldn't be able to know the value of the boundary stone!" Xuan Gang True Ancestor guessed.

"That's right, it's good that the people of the Dark Temple know about the existence of the Boundary Beast, where do they know the Boundary Stone. The boundary stone can only be born in the body of the dead boundary beast, and it is a kind of treasure that will slowly condense into the strange world when the origin of the boundary beast escapes in the body. But the value of the boundary beast is so great, no one wants to kill the boundary beast, but the boundary beast is different from the Dao Ancestor, it has a lifespan, because it is not strictly speaking a real Dao Ancestor, but the strength level has reached the Dao Ancestor level. So, its lifespan is about the same as that of the True Ancestor. In our Divine Heaven Realm, there were only a few old and dead realm beasts in history, so there were very few boundary stones born. Otherwise, the information of the boundary stone would have been exposed long ago!" muttered the Xuanling True Ancestor.

In the eyes of people who don't know how to use it, the boundary stone is just an ordinary stone, at most it is regarded as a top power stone, but in the eyes of those who understand the value of the boundary stone, the boundary stone is the supreme treasure.

The Liuli Sect happened to know the value of the boundary stones, and a long time ago, when the domain boundary was not broken, the Liuli Sect purchased hundreds of boundary stones through special channels at a huge price.

They used the boundary stone plus secret techniques to improve the talents of some of their disciples.

According to their understanding, a boundary stone could allow a disciple's talent to be directly raised to the super god level.

What does this mean?

In the realm, there are only a few people with super god-level talents, and there are very few treasures that can raise their talents to super god-level levels.

In fact, most of the talents of many geniuses are god-level, and only a few are super-god-level.

And geniuses with some special talents often put a lot of effort into raising that special talent to the super god level, but they still can't do it.

For example, having a comprehension talent, a god-level comprehension talent is not rare, but a super-god-level comprehension talent is too rare, and there are not even any treasures that can raise the comprehension talent to the super-god level.

The boundary stone is different, it can improve any talent, but it can only be promoted to the super god level, and cannot be promoted to a Dao-level natal talent.

But even so, the boundary stone is precious.

For a faction, as long as it has enough boundary stones, it is enough to cultivate a large number of peerless geniuses.

In the past, they had paid a huge price for hundreds of boundary stones, but now they had all the boundary stones in the body of a boundary beast.

How many boundary stones are there? It's unimaginable!

"Our Liuli Sect is going to rise in the future!"

Xuanling True Ancestor and Xuangang True Ancestor looked at each other and smiled.

Immediately, they informed the Dao Ancestors who had awakened a wisp of consciousness, and the Dao Ancestors conveyed an order to prohibit the leakage of the news of the Boundary Stone, and also asked the Dark Temple not to leak the Boundary Beast.

Also, they weren't allowed to tell the Dark Temple about the secrets of the Boundary Stone.

And the Liuli Sect also agreed to make a move against the Void Sky One Vein, otherwise after a long time, the Void Sky One Vein found the headquarters of the Dark God Temple, and it would be troublesome.

Now.

Ye Tian didn't know that the Liuli Sect, one of the Five Heavenly Forces, was going to make a move against the Void Heaven One Line, and he was at the headquarters of the Void Heaven Palace, discussing with the other True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Hall how to develop the Void Heaven True Kingdom.
